p.strong: IRQ1 → Port 0x60 → Make/Break Logic → Translation Tables → Circular Buffer
p.em: Technical Specification: Scancode Set 1 Parsing & Modifier State Tracking

ul.li: Break: Make code with bit 7 (0x80) set.
Timing: Controller status bit 0 must be 1 before reading 0x60.
Atomic: Interrupts must be disabled (cli/sti) during tail updates.
Overflow: If (tail + 1) % 256 == head, the buffer is full; drop input.
Consumption: TTY driver reads via head index.
